Hello, I'm

Rupanjana Choudhury

Full stack developer with a thing for clean interfaces, reliable APIs, and systems that feel effortless to use. I build across React, Node.js, Spring Boot, and Angular, mixing strong fundamentals with a sharp eye for product polish.

Download CV Contact Me

Get To Know More

About Me

Current Role System Engineer

Tata Consultancy Services

Education B.Tech CSE

VIT Vellore

Hi, I’m Rupanjana, a CSE graduate from VIT Vellore who loves turning complex ideas into neat, usable software. I enjoy the whole build loop: shaping a clean UI, wiring it to dependable APIs, debugging the weird edge cases, and making the final experience feel smooth.

I’ve worked on hospital management workflows, ETL pipelines, responsive components, and LLM explainability projects, while also coordinating large-scale technical events. Basically, I like code with purpose, teams with energy, and products that do more than just look good.

Where I Have Built

Experience

Sept 2025 - Present | Chennai, Tamil Nadu System Engineer
  • Engineered a full-stack hospital management system with React and Node.js, improving appointment scheduling and reducing manual slot management.
  • Implemented secure REST APIs with token-based authentication for smooth data flow across doctor and patient booking modules.
  • Earned HackerRank certification in Java and REST API basics, strengthening core programming and problem-solving credibility.
July 2025 - Sept 2025 | Chennai, Tamil Nadu Software Engineer Intern
  • Developed modular, responsive web components using JavaScript and React with a focus on clean code and maintainable UI structure.
  • Built web-based projects that sharpened problem-solving, modular coding, and responsive frontend development skills.
Sept 2023 - Nov 2023 | Sohar, Oman IT Intern
  • Contributed to ETL pipeline design, development, and optimization for efficient and reliable organizational data flow.
  • Worked with Microsoft technologies and learned security architecture, operational workflows, and enterprise IT practices.
